description: SPECTROMETER modeled as Lock
CENTRIFUGE modeled as Lock
FUME_HOOD modeled as Lock
CHROMATOGRAPH modeled as Lock
REAGENT_SUPPLY modeled as Counter (initial=3)
channel from CHEMIST to BIOLOGIST for compound
channel from BIOLOGIST to ANALYST for test results
channel from ANALYST to CHEMIST for quality report
channel from BIOLOGIST to QC_CONTROLLER for bioassay data
channel from QC_CONTROLLER to BIOLOGIST for verification result
channel from BIOLOGIST to CHEMIST for re-synthesis request
channel from QC_CONTROLLER to CHEMIST for final approval
CHEMIST must synthesize before any analysis
BIOLOGIST runs bioassay only after receiving compound
ANALYST analyzes only after receiving test results
CHEMIST final validation only after QC_CONTROLLER approval
run_analysis requires SPECTROMETER
run_separation requires CENTRIFUGE
run_synthesis requires FUME_HOOD
run_chromatography requires CHROMATOGRAPH
QC_CONTROLLER verification requires FUME_HOOD + SPECTROMETER
SAFETY_OFFICER acquires ALL 4 instruments simultaneously
QC_CONTROLLER can approve or reject BIOLOGIST's bioassay data
synthesis can pass or fail
CHEMIST (spec->cent) and BIOLOGIST (cent->spec) acquire in opposite order
QC_CONTROLLER needs FUME_HOOD + SPECTROMETER -- hold-and-wait
SAFETY_OFFICER acquires all 4 instruments -- deadlock if any scientist holds one
QC_CONTROLLER rejection cascades: bio->CHEMIST re-synthesis costs reagent, may exhaust supply
REAGENT_SUPPLY=3 bounds total synthesis attempts -- counter exhaustion blocks protocol
circular feedback: CHEMIST->BIOLOGIST->ANALYST->QC_CONTROLLER->(reject)->BIOLOGIST->CHEMIST
all five scientists can start working concurrently
